title: Light Indulgent Uruguayan Rice Vermicelli Stir-fry
description: A light and indulgent Uruguayan dish featuring rice vermicelli, prepared with a blend of aromatic herbs and spices for an irresistible flavor profile.
instructions: Rinse the rice vermicelli under cold water and soak in hot water for about 30 minutes, then drain.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Add soaked rice vermicelli to the pan with a pinch of red pepper flakes. Stir well to coat with the oil and spices.
Pour in the minced garlic, chopped onion, and mixed vegetables. Toss everything together for 3 minutes or until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Drizzle with lime juice and mix gently. Season with salt as needed.
Serve immediately over a bed of rice vermicelli.
